Missed Cleveland?

October 1995
Journalism & Newsroom

Information on how to obtain tape recordings and handouts from CAR Rock '95, a journalism conference, through Sound Images and Investigative Reporters and Editors.

Missed Cleveland? To order tape recordings of CAR Rock '95 sessions, call Sound Images at (303) 649-1811. For handouts, call Investigative Reporters and Editors at (314) 882-2042.
